titleText: JTF News: CBC News, Government of Canada
mainText: The Canadian Radio-television and Telecommunications Commission (CRTC) eliminates fees for cancelling or switching cellphone and internet plans.

titleText: JTF News: The Guardian, CBC News
mainText: Two plasma donors died at private Canadian clinics under federal investigation.

titleText: JTF News: PBS NewsHour, ABC News Australia
mainText: Chef René Redzepi resigned from Noma restaurant amid abuse allegations.

titleText: JTF News: PBS NewsHour, Deutsche Welle
mainText: Iran's leader calls for closure of the Strait of Hormuz as oil prices increase.

titleText: JTF News: CBC News, BBC News
mainText: Death toll from floods and landslides in Ethiopia reaches more than 60.
